creator: pr3tty8oyfl0yd@gmail.com
text:
I apologize if this is not the correct place to be reaching out with this issue. I am looking to get in touch and find out if the use of FreeBSD on custom hardware and then it being sold is legal under the foundation and security licensing and laws setup by FreeBSD. In my area their is a company building hardware and placing FreeBSD on it, and then selling the device under their own name. I am just trying to find out if this is legal and if not who should this be reported to etc?

Thanks.
